jobs.name: ARM Pre-Market Snapshot
jobs.message: ARM pre-market snapshot. web_search "ARM Holdings ARMH stock pre-market today". Extract pre-market price, % change vs prev close, one headline if notable. write_file /lfs/memory/arm_stock_today.md (overwrite, under 100 words). No email/Telegram — this feeds the 06:20 morning briefing.

jobs.name: Morning Briefing
jobs.message: MORNING BRIEFING (fast path) — read /lfs/skills/morning-briefing.md FIRST (read_file ALONE in iter 1). The prefetch1 cron at 06:05 already gathered all live data into /lfs/memory/brief_data.md. Your job: read brief_data.md + USER.md + MEMORY.md + calendar.md + reading.md + family.md (these reads can ALL be parallel in one iteration), then compose the 6-section, 600-900 word email. Do NOT call web_search / rss_fetch / get_weather / klipper — that data is already in brief_data.md. Exception: Fri/Sat/Sun make ONE noaa_buoy call for the Surf section. send_email to jcfield@gmail.com LAST (never batched with read_file). If brief_data.md is missing or >3h stale, follow the skill's SLOW PATH fallback (live gathering). If send_email fails, telegram_send_message chat 5538967144 with the FULL body verbatim.

jobs.name: HA Update Check
jobs.message: Run ha-updater skill: read /lfs/skills/ha-updater.md FIRST in iteration 1 (alone). Then check HA Core, OS, integration updates per the skill steps. Auto-install integration/device firmware. QUIET-BY-DEFAULT: only email James for HA Core/OS updates needing manual action; only Telegram-notify on auto-installs that ran or errors. If EVERYTHING is current (no Core update, no OS update, no integrations installed), send NOTHING — no email, no Telegram. James does not want a daily "all good" ping.

jobs.name: Friday Weekend Surf Outlook
jobs.message: Use the surf-forecast skill for a WEEKEND OUTLOOK at Pacifica/Lindamar (beginner surfer — James). noaa_buoy station 46012 for current conditions, then web_search "Pacifica Linda Mar surf forecast Saturday Sunday [dates]". Give GO/MAYBE/SKIP verdict for BOTH Saturday AND Sunday (✅GO 1-3ft clean · ⚠️MAYBE 3-4ft · ❌SKIP 4ft+; Linda Mar ≈60% of open-ocean buoy). Highlight which day looks better. telegram_send_message 2-3 sentence summary: which day to paddle out, expected size/period/wind, and wh

jobs.name: Saturday Surf Check
jobs.message: Use the surf-forecast skill to check surf conditions at Pacifica/Lindamar beach for tomorrow Sunday. Use the noaa_buoy tool first for real buoy data (station 46012), then web_search for tomorrow's forecast if needed. Give a clear GO/MAYBE/SKIP verdict. Send James a Telegram message with the full surf report.

jobs.name: Monday Wirecutter Deals
jobs.message: Use the wirecutter_deals skill: search Wirecutter for current top deals on consumer electronics, computing, audio/video, and smart home. Filter for items under $500. Send James an email summary of the top 5-7 deals with links.

jobs.name: Friday Weekend Planner
jobs.message: Use the weekend-planner skill: compile a weekend-at-a-glance digest for James. Check surf forecast for Saturday and Sunday at Pacifica/Lindamar (go/no-go verdict for each day), SF weather for the weekend, any upcoming tech events within 14 days, and France trip countdown if within 60 days. Send via Telegram.

jobs.name: Sunday ARM Ecosystem News
jobs.message: Use the arm-news skill: run the weekly ARM ecosystem news scan. Fetch Arm newsroom RSS, then search for Qualcomm Snapdragon PC/Chromebook news, MediaTek Dimensity/Kompanio news, and Windows on Arm/Copilot+ PC updates from the past week. Filter for relevance to Arm's PC and Chromebook business. Send a concise digest to James via Telegram (5-8 bullets max, 4 web_search calls max).

jobs.name: France Trip Prep Reminder
jobs.message: Travel prep reminder: France trip is in 7 days (June 14). Tasks: cancel SF Chronicle newspapers, suspend USPS mail at usps.com/manage/hold-mail.htm, notify bank/credit card of travel to France, check passport expiry (must be valid past Dec 2026). Send James a Telegram message with the full checklist from the travel-prep skill.

jobs.name: Weekly Memory Compaction
jobs.message: Run the memory-compactor skill: read MEMORY.md, remove duplicate or superseded entries, merge related facts, keep total size under 8KB. Write the compacted result back to MEMORY.md. Log a one-line summary of what was removed.

jobs.name: Klipper Update Check
jobs.message: Run klipper-updater skill: read /lfs/skills/klipper-updater.md FIRST in iteration 1 (alone). Single call to /machine/update/status?refresh=false. QUIET-BY-DEFAULT: email only on klipper/moonraker/system needing manual action; Telegram only on errors. GOLDEN RULE: at most ONE send_email per turn. If everything is current, send NOTHING. If a print is active, skip notifications entirely.

jobs.name: Frame TV Daily Art
jobs.message: Run frame-tv-daily skill: read /lfs/skills/frame-tv-daily.md and follow it. Two tool calls only: get_weather, then frame_tv with a weather/season-appropriate prompt. Silent on success — no Telegram or email notification.

jobs.name: Microsoft Build Prep (one-shot)
jobs.message: MICROSOFT BUILD PREP — Build is in 7 days (Jun 2-3, Seattle). web_search "Microsoft Build 2026 sessions ARM Snapdragon Windows on Arm" and pick the top 3-5 sessions James should attend. web_search "Microsoft Build 2026 keynote agenda". send_email to: jcfield@gmail.com subject: "📅 MS Build prep — 7 days out" with sessions list, key topics to expect, suggested partner meetings (HP/Dell/Lenovo Arm PCs), travel reminder. Under 400 words. Also telegram_send_message chat 5538967144 with a 3-line summary pointing to the email.

jobs.name: Briefing Prefetch
jobs.message: Run brief-prefetch skill: read /lfs/skills/brief-prefetch.md and execute all steps. Refresh /lfs/memory/brief_data.md (weather, ARM/NASDAQ/GBP, HN/ARM RSS, printer). Runs every 4h as an ambient cache: the 06:05 fire feeds the 06:20 morning brief; other fires keep the cache fresh for ad-hoc voice/Telegram weather/market/news/printer queries (see ambient-cache skill). Silent on success.
